overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a rainy night in a historic Western city (Saint Denis). The character moves along covered sidewalks and open market squares with gas lamp lighting, wet cobblestone streets, and period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk of historic commercial district

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street
character turns slightly to the right while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing the rainy street and passing carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden and iron roof structure providing shelter over the sidewalk
multi-story brick building with decorative balconies and arched windows
empty wooden slatted bench on the sidewalk
stacked wooden shipping crates near the bench
black cast iron gas lamp post with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk during a rainy night, passing wooden benches and crates. A horse-drawn carriage moves along the wet cobblestone street to the left, while ornate historic buildings with gas lamps line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with storefronts and signage

events.description: passing the stationers building and approaching a more open street corner
moving into area with brighter street lamp illumination reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various storefronts and commercial buildings

entered.detail: two-story building with 'STATIONERS & NEWS AGENT' signage on the facade
cylindrical metal garbage bin on the sidewalk
tall multi-story building with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Stationers & News Agent building along the covered walkway. The street opens up slightly with wet cobblestones reflecting the gas lamps. The covered roof shifts to the right side as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square approach with newspaper kiosks and stalls

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open market square area
approaching market stalls with green awnings and wooden barrels

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area approaching the central stalls and kiosks

entered.detail: white wooden kiosk covered with posters and advertisements
market stall with green canvas awning and wooden support posts
stacked wooden barrels near the market stall
large metal and wood structure resembling a train station or warehouse

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into an open market square. Newspaper kiosks appear on the left while market stalls with green awnings come into view ahead. The area is more exposed to the rain with wet cobblestones reflecting the overhead lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with produce stalls and wooden crates

events.description: character slows down while approaching the market stall and NPC
approaching an NPC standing near the market stall entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a market stall and slowing down as an NPC comes into view

notable_agents.action: male NPC in suspenders standing near the market stall, facing the street

entered.detail: wooden market stall with green awning displaying goods and barrels
large stone building with 'EL CHEVALIER' signage on the facade
stacked wooden shipping crates near the market entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the central market square, approaching a produce stall with a green awning. The El Chevalier building looms on the left while wooden crates and barrels surround the stall area. An NPC in suspenders stands near the stall as the character slows down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy city street that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into an open, bustling market square. It begins with the character walking along a covered walkway past wooden benches and crates, while a horse-drawn carriage passes on the wet cobblestones under the glow of gas lamps. As the character moves past the Stationers & News Agent building, the covered roof shifts to the right and the street opens up, allowing the reflections of the lamps to spread across the damp ground. The scene then expands as the character exits the shelter into an open square, passing newspaper kiosks and approaching market stalls with green awnings under the falling rain. Finally, the camera enters the central market area, moving past the El Chevalier building and wooden barrels toward a produce stall where an NPC in suspenders stands.
